title: Gravesia apiculata
taxonomy: Gravesia apiculata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a member of the genus Gravesia, which is a small group of plants found in tropical regions. The plant is native to Madagascar and is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations. The classification of Gravesia apiculata is further refined at the level of family and genus, providing a detailed understanding of its evolutionary relationships.
